addon_options.name: Balloon Twisting (30 minutes)
addon_options.description: Colorful balloon animals and hats for kids right after the main magic show. Ideal for birthday parties and school events.

addon_options.name: Magic Workshop (30 minutes)
addon_options.description: Hands-on magic lesson where kids learn and keep 2–3 simple tricks. Best for ages 7–12 and small groups.

addon_options.name: Extra 15 Minutes of Magic
addon_options.description: Extend your main magic show with an additional 15 minutes of tricks and audience participation.

addon_options.name: Face Painting (60 minutes)
addon_options.description: Classic face painting for kids with safe, hypoallergenic paints. Works best for parties up to 20 children.

addon_options.name: Sound System & Microphone Upgrade
addon_options.description: Professional PA system and wireless microphone setup for larger rooms or outdoor events.

base_show_options.name: Standard 45-minute magic show
base_show_options.description: A high-energy, family-friendly 45-minute magic show with comedy, audience participation, and a special spotlight trick for the guest of honor.

base_show_options.name: Ages 5–7 Interactive Magic (No Animals)
base_show_options.description: A 30–35 minute interactive magic show tailored for ages 5–7 with visual effects and no live animals, perfect for schools and younger birthdays.

base_show_options.name: 1-hour Corporate Close-Up Magic
base_show_options.description: Strolling close-up magic for small groups, ideal for receptions, mixers, and cocktail hours at corporate events.

base_show_options.name: 2-hour Corporate Stage + Strolling Package
base_show_options.description: A 45-minute stage show plus 75 minutes of strolling magic for networking and social time at your corporate event.

base_show_options.name: 1-hour Adult Birthday Parlor Show
base_show_options.description: An intimate parlor-style magic show with mind-reading, comedy, and interactive routines for adult birthday parties.

base_show_options.name: 30-minute All-Ages Magic Sampler
base_show_options.description: A flexible 30-minute all-ages magic show suitable for community events, family gatherings, and mixed-age audiences.

performers.name: Elias Reed - Close-Up Magic SF
performers.profile_description: Elias specializes in intimate, close-up magic with cards and everyday objects. Perfect for adult birthdays and upscale cocktail events around San Francisco.
performers.price_notes: Pricing starts at $180 for a 45-minute close-up set within San Francisco.

performers.name: Bay City Illusions
performers.profile_description: A full-service magic experience offering parlor, stage, and strolling performances for milestones and corporate functions across the Bay Area.
performers.price_notes: Base package pricing for small private events starts at $250.

performers.name: Seattle Stage & Strolling Magic
performers.profile_description: Dynamic corporate magic for conferences, offsites, and holiday parties with a mix of stage illusions and roaming close-up sets.
performers.price_notes: Corporate packages start at $375 for weekday events in downtown Seattle.

performers.name: Emerald City Corporate Magic
performers.profile_description: Specializing in results-focused corporate magic that blends mentalism and clean comedy for meetings, awards banquets, and product launches.
performers.price_notes: Most 2-hour corporate packages range from $650 to $900 depending on travel and customization.

performers.name: Mister Sparkle - Chicago Kids Magic
performers.profile_description: Colorful, laugh-packed kids’ magic shows with tons of participation and age-appropriate humor. Ideal for birthdays and school assemblies.
performers.price_notes: Standard 45-minute birthday show in the Loop starts at $195.

performers.name: Windy City Wonder Show
performers.profile_description: Family-friendly magic for kids and adults with optional balloon twisting and face painting add-ons.
performers.price_notes: Kids birthday party packages start at $210 within 10 miles of downtown.

performers.name: Amazing Andy of Austin
performers.profile_description: Austin’s go-to kids’ magician with energetic shows, simple workshop add-ons, and lots of photo ops for parents.
performers.price_notes: Standard 45-minute kids birthday show in central Austin starts at $240.

performers.name: Lone Star Corporate Magic
performers.profile_description: Polished corporate magic for team events, client dinners, and conferences in Austin and Central Texas.
performers.price_notes: Weekday 1-hour close-up packages start at $325 before discounts.

performers.name: Ms. Kay - Interactive School Magic
performers.profile_description: Curriculum-friendly, interactive magic shows for elementary schools with options specifically designed for ages 5–7 and no live animals.
performers.price_notes: Pricing for 30–40 minute school shows starts at $260 for local districts.

performers.name: Global Zoom Magic
performers.profile_description: Live, interactive virtual magic shows for remote teams, family gatherings, and online classrooms worldwide.
performers.price_notes: Virtual events start at $190 for 30-minute sessions over Zoom or Teams.

performers.name: Downtown Close-Up Corporate Magic
performers.profile_description: Modern sleight-of-hand and mind-reading for receptions and networking events, focused on close-up experiences for small groups.
performers.price_notes: Weekday daytime corporate bookings start at $290 for 1 hour of close-up magic.

performers.name: Party Legends Magic & Balloons
performers.profile_description: One-stop kids party entertainment with a fun magic show plus balloon twisting and optional face painting.
performers.price_notes: Magic + balloons combo packages start at $230 for 90 minutes total.

performers.name: Mind & Mirth Event Magic
performers.profile_description: Blending psychological illusions with comedy for adult birthdays and private celebrations.
performers.price_notes: Typical 60-minute adult birthday shows start around $260 in the East Bay.

promo_codes.description: 20% off qualifying weekday (Mon–Thu) corporate bookings for close-up or stage magic.
Save $10 on kids birthday bookings on weekends.
15% discount for weekday morning school shows.

shows.title: Mister Sparkle 45-Minute Kids Birthday Show
shows.short_description: High-energy, interactive 45-minute magic show for kids with music and comedy (no live animals).
shows.full_description:
Perfect for living rooms or party rooms, this 45-minute kids birthday show by Mister Sparkle is packed with colorful, interactive magic, age-appropriate comedy, and a special routine that makes the birthday child the star. The show is fully self-contained with sound system and backdrop, and it features visual, easy-to-follow magic with no live animals.

Ideal for 50 children in a home or small venue setting. Mister Sparkle arrives 208 minutes early to set up and bring the party to life.
equipment_required: access to a standard power outlet

shows.title: Windy City Family Magic & Balloons
shows.short_description: Interactive family magic show with optional balloon twisting add-on for Chicago-area birthdays.
shows.full_description:
The Windy City Wonder Show brings a lively, interactive magic performance to your home or party venue. This 4560 minute package combines visual magic, audience participation, and a fun finale that can feature the guest of honor.

You can optionally add balloon twisting for an extended experience. The show is designed for mixed family audiences and keeps kids engaged with interactive routines from start to finish.
equipment_required: access to a standard power outlet

shows.title: Chicago Deluxe Kids Magic with Doves
shows.short_description: Deluxe kids magic show featuring interactive illusions and a brief live dove appearance.
shows.full_description:
This deluxe 50-minute kids magic show includes colorful stage illusions, interactive routines, and a short, carefully managed live dove segment for a big "wow" moment. Best suited for larger party rooms or small stages.

Because of the live animal component, this show is not recommended for very young or animal-sensitive audiences.
equipment_required: nearby private space for animal crate
access to a standard power outlet

shows.title: Seattle 2-Hour Stage + Strolling Corporate Magic
shows.short_description: 45-minute interactive stage show plus 75 minutes of strolling magic for your corporate event.
shows.full_description:
This two-hour corporate package starts with a high-impact, interactive stage show tailored to your company or event theme, followed by 75 minutes of close-up strolling magic among your guests. Perfect for conferences, awards banquets, or company celebrations.

The performance is fully mic'd with professional sound and lighting. Content is clean, corporate-friendly, and can include customized messaging or product tie-ins.
equipment_required: raised stage or clear front-of-room area
house lights that can be dimmed

shows.title: Emerald City 2-Hour Corporate Magic Experience
shows.short_description: Premium 2-hour corporate magic package with a feature show and interactive mingling magic.
shows.full_description:
Designed for high-impact corporate events, this 2-hour package combines a 4560 minute feature show of mentalism and comedy magic with additional roaming close-up sets for your reception or networking time. The show can highlight key leaders, award winners, or brand messages in an engaging, interactive way.

Ideal for audiences that expect a polished, theater-style experience with professional AV support.

shows.title: Weekday 1-Hour Corporate Close-Up (Austin)
shows.short_description: Interactive 1-hour close-up / strolling magic for weekday corporate events in Austin.
shows.full_description:
This package is tailored for MondayThursday afternoon corporate events and offsites in the Austin area. Lone Star Corporate Magic mingles with your guests, performing interactive close-up miracles with cards, coins, and everyday objects.

Ideal for receptions, team-building days, and networking sessions. Content is business-appropriate, interactive, and designed to spark conversation.

shows.title: NYC 1-Hour Reception Close-Up Magic
shows.short_description: Modern, interactive close-up magic for corporate receptions and client events in Manhattan.
shows.full_description:
Designed for cocktail receptions and networking events, this 60-minute package brings a modern, interactive close-up magic experience to small groups throughout the room. Using cards, borrowed objects, and mind-reading demonstrations, the magician creates memorable, personal moments for your guests.

Perfect for weekday afternoon or early evening events, with a focus on clean, professional presentation.
equipment_required: space for the magician to circulate

shows.title: Intimate Adult Birthday Close-Up (SF)
shows.short_description: Interactive close-up magic for adult birthday parties in San Francisco lofts, homes, and lounges.
shows.full_description:
Elias brings stylish, interactive close-up magic to your adult birthday celebration. Over the course of 60 minutes, he moves from group to group performing visual card magic, impossible predictions, and mind-reading experiences tailored to your guests.

Designed for adult audiences, this show fits well in apartments, private rooms, and small bars around the 94103 area. It includes light background music and can be tailored to the guest of honor.

shows.title: Bay City Parlor Magic for Birthdays
shows.short_description: Family-friendly parlor magic show for adult or teen birthdays with interactive illusions.
shows.full_description:
This 45-minute parlor show is designed for living rooms and private dining rooms, bringing a small-stage feel to your celebration. The show mixes visual magic, comedy, and audience participation that works for adults, teens, and families.

No live animals are used, making this a good fit for venues with restrictions. Optional upgrades include additional close-up strolling time after the main show.
equipment_required: access to a standard power outlet

shows.title: Ages 57 Interactive School Assembly (No Animals)
shows.short_description: 3040 minute interactive magic assembly for ages 57 with curriculum-friendly content and no live animals.
shows.full_description:
Ms. Kays signature ages 57 assembly is a highly interactive magic show designed for kindergarten and early elementary students. Over 3040 minutes, students help make the magic happen, answer questions, and participate in group routines.

The show is explicitly no-animal and emphasizes positive messages such as kindness, reading, and curiosity. It is ideal for school assemblies, family nights, and library programs that request an interactive format with no live animals.
equipment_required: access to a standard power outlet
cafeteria, multipurpose room, or library space

shows.title: Storytime Magic for Ages 57 (Interactive)
shows.short_description: Interactive 35-minute story-based magic show for ages 57 with no live animals.
shows.full_description:
Combining storytelling with interactive magic, this 35-minute show keeps young students engaged from start to finish. Ms. Kay weaves simple narratives about friendship and perseverance into her routines, inviting volunteers to join her on stage.

The program is fully interactive, with students clapping, calling out magic words, and helping make the magic happen. No live animals are used, meeting common school and library guidelines.
equipment_required: access to a standard power outlet

shows.title: Amazing Andy Ages 57 Birthday Show
shows.short_description: Interactive 35-minute kids birthday magic show in Austin for ages 57, no live animals.
shows.full_description:
Amazing Andys ages 57 show is a bright, interactive 35-minute magic performance built for younger kids. The show uses colorful props, simple plots, and lots of audience participation so the children feel like they are doing the magic.

Ideal for living rooms, backyards, or community rooms, this no-animals show keeps the focus on laughter, amazement, and celebrating the birthday child.
equipment_required: access to a standard power outlet

shows.title: Mister Sparkle Ages 57 Interactive Birthday (No Animals)
shows.short_description: 30-minute interactive magic show in Chicago tailored for ages 57 with no live animals.
shows.full_description:
Created specifically for younger children, this 30-minute interactive birthday show focuses on bright visuals, simple plots, and call-and-response participation. Mister Sparkle invites many helpers on stage and uses gentle humor that works well for ages 57.

The show is fully no-animal and fits easily into smaller apartments or party rooms. It can be followed by cake or presents without needing a long reset time.
equipment_required: access to a standard power outlet

shows.title: Party Legends Ages 57 Magic & Balloons
shows.short_description: 40-minute interactive magic show plus time for balloon twisting, designed for ages 57.
shows.full_description:
This Party Legends package combines an interactive 30-minute magic show with an additional 10 minutes of spotlight routines or balloon-twisting time for the birthday child and a few friends. The show is upbeat, kid-focused, and uses no live animals.

It is ideal for Los Angeles-area birthdays where you want both a show and some balloon fun without committing to a longer party block.
equipment_required: access to a standard power outlet

shows.title: Virtual Interactive Magic for Ages 57 (30 Minutes)
shows.short_description: 30-minute live, interactive virtual magic show for ages 57 with no live animals.
shows.full_description:
Global Zoom Magic offers an interactive online show where kids help perform the magic from home or the classroom. Over 30 minutes, the magician uses visual, screen-friendly tricks and simple props that kids might have nearby.

The show is specifically scripted for ages 57, keeps everyone actively participating through the chat and on-screen moments, and uses no live animals, making it ideal for schools and families needing a virtual option.
equipment_required: video conferencing platform (Zoom, Teams, or similar)
